VAULTS.Sync.NothingToDo: Vault is already up to date.
VAULTS.Sync.TokenExpired: Vault token for {name} has expired. Click Authenticate, then Sync again.
VAULTS.Connect.StepOpen: Open the vault sign-in page in your browser:
VAULTS.Connect.StepPaste: Paste the token shown back here:
VAULTS.Connect.PasteInvalid: That doesn't look like a token. Tokens have three dot-separated parts.
VAULTS.Connect.PasteExpired: That token has already expired. Open the sign-in page again to get a fresh one.
VAULTS.Dialog.Title: Vaults
VAULTS.Dialog.RemoveHint: Remove deletes this vault's journals and image cache from the world. The vault on the server is not affected.
VAULTS.Dialog.RemoveConfirmBody: Delete all journals and cached images for {name}? This can't be undone (you can re-sync to restore).
VAULTS.Dialog.DmRoleHint: Pages whose role is below this tier are imported as player-visible (Observer ownership). Pages at this tier or higher stay GM-only.
